targets.name: gl_je_headers
targets.sourceQuery: SELECT JE_HEADER_ID, LAST_UPDATE_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, LEDGER_ID, LEGAL_ENTITY_ID, JE_CATEGORY, JE_SOURCE, PERIOD_NAME, NAME, CURRENCY_CODE, STATUS, DATE_CREATED, ACTUAL_FLAG, DEFAULT_EFFECTIVE_DATE, CREATION_DATE, CREATED_BY, DESCRIPTION, JE_BATCH_ID, POSTED_DATE, BALANCED_JE_FLAG, BALANCING_SEGMENT_VALUE, RUNNING_TOTAL_DR, RUNNING_TOTAL_CR, RUNNING_TOTAL_ACCOUNTED_DR, RUNNING_TOTAL_ACCOUNTED_CR, CONTROL_TOTAL, ACCRUAL_REV_FLAG, MULTI_BAL_SEG_FLAG, MULTI_CURRENCY_FLAG, TAX_STATUS_CODE, JE_FROM_SLA_FLAG, REVERSED_JE_HEADER_ID, PARENT_JE_HEADER_ID, DOC_SEQUENCE_ID, DOC_SEQUENCE_VALUE, EXTERNAL_REFERENCE, REFERENCE_DATE FROM GL_JE_HEADERS WHERE LAST_UPDATE_DATE > ?

targets.name: ap_invoices
targets.sourceQuery: SELECT INVOICE_ID, LAST_UPDATE_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, VENDOR_ID, INVOICE_NUM, SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE, PAYMENT_CURRENCY_CODE, PAYMENT_CROSS_RATE, INVOICE_AMOUNT, VENDOR_SITE_ID, AMOUNT_PAID, DISCOUNT_AMOUNT_TAKEN, INVOICE_DATE, SOURCE, INVOICE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE, DESCRIPTION, TERMS_ID, TERMS_DATE, PAYMENT_METHOD_CODE, PAY_GROUP_LOOKUP_CODE, ACCTS_PAY_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, PAYMENT_STATUS_FLAG, CREATION_DATE, CREATED_BY, BASE_AMOUNT, EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE, EXCHANGE_RATE, EXCHANGE_DATE, GL_DATE, CANCELLED_DATE, CANCELLED_AMOUNT, TOTAL_TAX_AMOUNT, LEGAL_ENTITY_ID, ORG_ID, PARTY_ID, PARTY_SITE_ID, APPROVAL_STATUS, APPROVAL_READY_FLAG, WFAPPROVAL_STATUS, PO_HEADER_ID, CREDITED_INVOICE_ID, DOC_SEQUENCE_ID, DOC_SEQUENCE_VALUE FROM AP_INVOICES_ALL WHERE LAST_UPDATE_DATE > ?

targets.name: hz_parties
targets.sourceQuery: SELECT PARTY_ID, PARTY_NUMBER, PARTY_NAME, PARTY_TYPE, PARTY_UNIQUE_NAME, LAST_UPDATE_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, CREATION_DATE, CREATED_BY, STATUS, CATEGORY_CODE, COUNTRY, ADDRESS1, ADDRESS2, ADDRESS3, ADDRESS4, CITY, POSTAL_CODE, STATE, PROVINCE, COUNTY, EMAIL_ADDRESS, URL, LANGUAGE_NAME, PERSON_PRE_NAME_ADJUNCT, PERSON_FIRST_NAME, PERSON_MIDDLE_NAME, PERSON_LAST_NAME, PERSON_NAME_SUFFIX, PERSON_TITLE, PERSON_PREVIOUS_LAST_NAME, PERSON_SECOND_LAST_NAME, PERSON_ACADEMIC_TITLE, DATE_OF_BIRTH, GENDER, MARITAL_STATUS, SALUTATION, HQ_BRANCH_IND, SIC_CODE, SIC_CODE_TYPE, DUNS_NUMBER_C, EMPLOYEES_TOTAL, CEO_NAME, YEAR_ESTABLISHED, FISCAL_YEAREND_MONTH, JGZZ_FISCAL_CODE, GROUP_TYPE, ORIG_SYSTEM_REFERENCE, VALIDATED_FLAG, INTERNAL_FLAG, THIRD_PARTY_FLAG, PRIMARY_PHONE_NUMBER, PRIMARY_PHONE_AREA_CODE, PRIMARY_PHONE_COUNTRY_CODE, PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD, HOME_COUNTRY FROM HZ_PARTIES WHERE LAST_UPDATE_DATE > ?
